panels.description: Org-level daily active user count; intentionally ignores the Selected User filter

targets.rawSql:
SELECT daily_active_user_count as "Org Daily Active Users"
FROM _tool_claude_code_activity_summary
WHERE connection_id = ${connection_id}
  AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'
ORDER BY `date` DESC
LIMIT 1

panels.title: Org Assigned Seats

panels.description: Org-level session total for the selected time range; intentionally ignores the Selected User filter

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cc_session_count), 0) as "Org Sessions"
FROM _tool_claude_code_user_activity
WHERE $__timeFilter(`date`)
  AND connection_id = ${connection_id}
  AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'

panels.title: Org Sessions

panels.description: Days since the freshest Claude analytics row across the registered metric tables; intentionally ignores the Selected User filter

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COALESCE(TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, MAX(latest_date), UTC_DATE()), 9999) as "Days Since Latest Data"
FROM (
  SELECT MAX(`date`) as latest_date
  FROM _tool_claude_code_user_activity
  WHERE connection_id = ${connection_id} AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT MAX(`date`) as latest_date
  FROM _tool_claude_code_activity_summary
  WHERE connection_id = ${connection_id} AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT MAX(`date`) as latest_date
  FROM _tool_claude_code_chat_project
  WHERE connection_id = ${connection_id} AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT MAX(`date`) as latest_date
  FROM _tool_claude_code_skill_usage
  WHERE connection_id = ${connection_id} AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT MAX(`date`) as latest_date
  FROM _tool_claude_code_connector_usage
  WHERE connection_id = ${connection_id} AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'
) latest_dates

panels.title: Data Freshness

panels.description: Sessions for the selected user; admins and managers can inspect any user, other viewers are restricted to their own email-matched data
panels.title: Selected User Sessions

panels.description: Tool acceptance rate for the selected user; admins and managers can inspect any user, other viewers are restricted to their own email-matched data
panels.title: Selected User Tool Acceptance Rate

panels.description: Lines added for the selected user; admins and managers can inspect any user, other viewers are restricted to their own email-matched data
panels.title: Selected User Lines Added

panels.description: Lines removed for the selected user; admins and managers can inspect any user, other viewers are restricted to their own email-matched data
panels.title: Selected User Lines Removed

panels.description: Commits for the selected user; admins and managers can inspect any user, other viewers are restricted to their own email-matched data
panels.title: Selected User Commits

panels.description: Pull requests for the selected user; admins and managers can inspect any user, other viewers are restricted to their own email-matched data
panels.title: Selected User PRs

panels.description: Days with recorded Claude activity for the selected user; admins and managers can inspect any user, other viewers are restricted to their own email-matched data

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
    WHEN (
      cc_session_count > 0
      OR cc_commit_count > 0
      OR cc_pull_request_count > 0
      OR cc_lines_added > 0
      OR cc_lines_removed > 0
      OR chat_conversation_count > 0
      OR web_search_count > 0
      OR edit_tool_accepted + edit_tool_rejected + multi_edit_tool_accepted + multi_edit_tool_rejected + write_tool_accepted + write_tool_rejected + notebook_edit_tool_accepted + notebook_edit_tool_rejected > 0
    ) THEN `date`
    ELSE NULL
  END) as "Selected User Active Days"
FROM _tool_claude_code_user_activity
WHERE $__timeFilter(`date`)
  AND connection_id = ${connection_id}
  AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'
  AND (
    ixd_get_user_role('${__user.email}') IN ('admin', 'manager')
    OR user_email = '${__user.email}'
  )
  AND (
    '${user:csv}' = '0'
    OR COALESCE(NULLIF(user_email, ''), user_id) = ${user:sqlstring}
  )

panels.title: Selected User Active Days

panels.description: Chat conversations for the selected user; admins and managers can inspect any user, other viewers are restricted to their own email-matched data
panels.title: Selected User Chat Conversations

panels.description: Sessions, commits, pull requests, and chat conversations over time for the selected user; admins and managers can inspect any user, other viewers are restricted to their own email-matched data

targets.rawSql:
SELECT `date` as time,
  SUM(cc_session_count) as "Sessions",
  SUM(cc_commit_count) as "Commits",
  SUM(cc_pull_request_count) as "PRs",
  SUM(chat_conversation_count) as "Chat Conversations"
FROM _tool_claude_code_user_activity
WHERE $__timeFilter(`date`)
  AND connection_id = ${connection_id}
  AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'
  AND (
    ixd_get_user_role('${__user.email}') IN ('admin', 'manager')
    OR user_email = '${__user.email}'
  )
  AND (
    '${user:csv}' = '0'
    OR COALESCE(NULLIF(user_email, ''), user_id) = ${user:sqlstring}
  )
GROUP BY `date`
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Selected User Activity Over Time

panels.description: Code churn over time for the selected user; admins and managers can inspect any user, other viewers are restricted to their own email-matched data

targets.rawSql:
SELECT `date` as time,
  SUM(cc_lines_added) as "Lines Added",
  SUM(cc_lines_removed) as "Lines Removed"
FROM _tool_claude_code_user_activity
WHERE $__timeFilter(`date`)
  AND connection_id = ${connection_id}
  AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'
  AND (
    ixd_get_user_role('${__user.email}') IN ('admin', 'manager')
    OR user_email = '${__user.email}'
  )
  AND (
    '${user:csv}' = '0'
    OR COALESCE(NULLIF(user_email, ''), user_id) = ${user:sqlstring}
  )
GROUP BY `date`
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Selected User Code Churn Over Time

panels.description: Accepted and rejected tool actions for the selected user; admins and managers can inspect any user, other viewers are restricted to their own email-matched data

targets.rawSql:
SELECT tool_name as "Tool",
  SUM(accepted) as "Accepted",
  SUM(rejected) as "Rejected",
  ROUND(SUM(accepted) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(accepted + rejected), 0), 1) as "Acceptance Rate %"
FROM (
  SELECT `date`, connection_id, scope_id, 'edit_tool' as tool_name, edit_tool_accepted as accepted, edit_tool_rejected as rejected, user_id, user_email
  FROM _tool_claude_code_user_activity
  UNION ALL
  SELECT `date`, connection_id, scope_id, 'multi_edit_tool' as tool_name, multi_edit_tool_accepted as accepted, multi_edit_tool_rejected as rejected, user_id, user_email
  FROM _tool_claude_code_user_activity
  UNION ALL
  SELECT `date`, connection_id, scope_id, 'write_tool' as tool_name, write_tool_accepted as accepted, write_tool_rejected as rejected, user_id, user_email
  FROM _tool_claude_code_user_activity
  UNION ALL
  SELECT `date`, connection_id, scope_id, 'notebook_edit_tool' as tool_name, notebook_edit_tool_accepted as accepted, notebook_edit_tool_rejected as rejected, user_id, user_email
  FROM _tool_claude_code_user_activity
) tool_actions
WHERE $__timeFilter(`date`)
  AND connection_id = ${connection_id}
  AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'
  AND (
    ixd_get_user_role('${__user.email}') IN ('admin', 'manager')
    OR user_email = '${__user.email}'
  )
  AND (
    '${user:csv}' = '0'
    OR COALESCE(NULLIF(user_email, ''), user_id) = ${user:sqlstring}
  )
GROUP BY tool_name
ORDER BY SUM(accepted + rejected) DESC, tool_name

panels.title: Selected User Tool Acceptance by Tool

panels.description: Daily activity details for the selected user without exposing user identity columns; admins and managers can inspect any user, other viewers are restricted to their own email-matched data

targets.rawSql:
SELECT `date` as "Day",
  SUM(cc_session_count) as "Sessions",
  SUM(chat_conversation_count) as "Chat Conversations",
  SUM(web_search_count) as "Web Searches",
  SUM(cc_lines_added) as "Lines Added",
  SUM(cc_lines_removed) as "Lines Removed",
  SUM(cc_commit_count) as "Commits",
  SUM(cc_pull_request_count) as "PRs",
  ROUND(
    SUM(edit_tool_accepted + multi_edit_tool_accepted + write_tool_accepted + notebook_edit_tool_accepted) * 100.0
      / NULLIF(
          SUM(
            edit_tool_accepted + multi_edit_tool_accepted + write_tool_accepted + notebook_edit_tool_accepted
            + edit_tool_rejected + multi_edit_tool_rejected + write_tool_rejected + notebook_edit_tool_rejected
          ),
          0
        ),
    1
  ) as "Tool Acceptance Rate %"
FROM _tool_claude_code_user_activity
WHERE $__timeFilter(`date`)
  AND connection_id = ${connection_id}
  AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'
  AND (
    ixd_get_user_role('${__user.email}') IN ('admin', 'manager')
    OR user_email = '${__user.email}'
  )
  AND (
    '${user:csv}' = '0'
    OR COALESCE(NULLIF(user_email, ''), user_id) = ${user:sqlstring}
  )
GROUP BY `date`
ORDER BY `date` DESC
LIMIT 60

panels.title: Org Seats and Pending Invites Over Time

panels.description: Diagnostics table for row counts and freshest available date per Claude metric table; intentionally ignores the Selected User filter

targets.rawSql:
SELECT *
FROM (
  SELECT '_tool_claude_code_activity_summary' as table_name,
    COUNT(*) as row_count,
    MAX(`date`) as latest_date,
    COALESCE(TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, MAX(`date`), UTC_DATE()), 9999) as days_lag
  FROM _tool_claude_code_activity_summary
  WHERE connection_id = ${connection_id} AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '_tool_claude_code_user_activity' as table_name,
    COUNT(*) as row_count,
    MAX(`date`) as latest_date,
    COALESCE(TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, MAX(`date`), UTC_DATE()), 9999) as days_lag
  FROM _tool_claude_code_user_activity
  WHERE connection_id = ${connection_id} AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '_tool_claude_code_skill_usage' as table_name,
    COUNT(*) as row_count,
    MAX(`date`) as latest_date,
    COALESCE(TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, MAX(`date`), UTC_DATE()), 9999) as days_lag
  FROM _tool_claude_code_skill_usage
  WHERE connection_id = ${connection_id} AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '_tool_claude_code_connector_usage' as table_name,
    COUNT(*) as row_count,
    MAX(`date`) as latest_date,
    COALESCE(TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, MAX(`date`), UTC_DATE()), 9999) as days_lag
  FROM _tool_claude_code_connector_usage
  WHERE connection_id = ${connection_id} AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '_tool_claude_code_chat_project' as table_name,
    COUNT(*) as row_count,
    MAX(`date`) as latest_date,
    COALESCE(TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, MAX(`date`), UTC_DATE()), 9999) as days_lag
  FROM _tool_claude_code_chat_project
  WHERE connection_id = ${connection_id} AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'
) data_volume
ORDER BY row_count DESC, table_name

panels.title: Data Volume by Table

list.label: Connection ID
list.name: connection_id

list.query: SELECT DISTINCT id as scope_id FROM _tool_claude_code_scopes WHERE connection_id = ${connection_id} ORDER BY 1

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT user_key as __value, user_key as __text FROM (SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(user_email, ''), user_id) as user_key, user_email FROM _tool_claude_code_user_activity WHERE connection_id = ${connection_id} AND scope_id = '${scope_id}') accessible_users WHERE ixd_get_user_role('${__user.email}') IN ('admin', 'manager') OR user_email = '${__user.email}' ORDER BY user_key
list.label: Selected User
list.name: user
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT user_key as __value, user_key as __text FROM (SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(user_email, ''), user_id) as user_key, user_email FROM _tool_claude_code_user_activity WHERE connection_id = ${connection_id} AND scope_id = '${scope_id}') accessible_users WHERE ixd_get_user_role('${__user.email}') IN ('admin', 'manager') OR user_email = '${__user.email}' ORDER BY user_key
